name: woocommerce-dev-cycle
description: Run tests, linting, and quality checks for WooCommerce development. Use when running tests, fixing code style, or following the development workflow.
capabilities: Run PHP unit tests with PHPUnit via Docker environment
Run JavaScript and Jest tests for the admin client
Check and fix PHP code style with WordPress Coding Standards
Lint JavaScript and TypeScript files for code quality
Fix markdown files with markdownlint for documentation
Troubleshoot common test and linting failures
author: woocommerce
securitySummary: This skill contains only markdown documentation files. All 197 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES - the analyzer detected bash command examples in code blocks and markdownlint rule codes, but there is no executable code, scripts, network calls, or external command execution. The skill is purely informational guidance for WooCommerce development workflows.
valueStatement: WooCommerce developers need to run tests and linting to ensure code quality. This skill provides the exact commands and workflows for PHP unit tests, JavaScript tests, and code style checks in the WooCommerce monorepo.
limitations: Does not execute tests or linting automatically
Requires Docker and wp-env for PHP test environment
Commands are for the WooCommerce monorepo only
Does not configure or install dependencies

useCases.title: Run test suite
useCases.description: Run PHP and JavaScript tests to verify code changes before committing

useCases.title: Check code quality
useCases.description: Run linting commands to verify code follows WordPress coding standards

useCases.title: Lint documentation
useCases.description: Check markdown files pass markdownlint validation before creating PRs

promptTemplates.title: Run PHP tests
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the PHP tests for the PaymentsExtensionSuggestionsTest class using the WooCommerce dev cycle skill

promptTemplates.title: Fix linting issues
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me fix PHP linting issues in my changed files using the WooCommerce dev cycle skill

promptTemplates.title: Check JS linting
promptTemplates.prompt: Run JavaScript linting on the files I changed in my current branch

promptTemplates.title: Full workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Guide me through the full WooCommerce development cycle: run tests, check linting, and fix any issues

bestPractices: Run specific tests for changed code during development to save time
Always run linting before committing to catch style issues early
Review automatic fixes with git diff before committing
antiPatterns: Running linting on the entire codebase instead of only changed files
Skipping linting checks before committing code changes
Ignoring test failures without investigating the root cause

faq.question: What PHP version is used for tests?
faq.answer: Tests run in Docker with PHP 8.1 and PHPUnit 9.6.24 via wp-env.

faq.question: How do I run tests for a single method?
faq.answer: Use the filter syntax: pnpm run test:php:env -- --filter ClassName::methodName

faq.question: Can I integrate this with CI pipelines?
faq.answer: Commands work in CI. Use full test runs without --filter for CI environments.

faq.question: Is my data safe when running these commands?
faq.answer: Commands run locally in Docker. No data is sent to external servers.

faq.question: Why do I get class not found errors?
faq.answer: Run pnpm install to install dependencies. Restart wp-env if issues persist.

faq.question: How is this different from other PHP linting skills?
faq.answer: This skill is specific to WooCommerce monorepo with WordPress coding standards configured.
